function.message: Completed the next inbox item by OCR-structuring all bills related to Petra Novak. I found 2 matching purchase bills, added schema-compliant YAML frontmatter to each while preserving the full original note body verbatim below the frontmatter, and then removed the processed inbox request.
function.rulebook_notes: Followed required bootstrap (tree -> AGENTS -> context), inspected 99_system before task work, read nested AGENTS in entered folders, used OCR workflow and finance schema, preserved original bodies during frontmatter migration, and deleted the inbox item only after full completion.
function.outcome_justification: The inbox request explicitly asked to OCR all bills related to Petra Novak. A search in 50_finance/purchases found two Petra Novak-related bills, and both files contained complete visible bill metadata and line items required by the finance bill schema. I updated both files with required YAML fields (`record_type`, `bill_id`, `alias`, `purchased_on`, `total_eur`, `counterparty`, `project`, `lines`, plus optional `related_entity`) and retained the exact existing body content beneath frontmatter. With the requested set fully processed, deleting 00_inbox/000_next-task.md satisfied the inbox workflow.
completed_steps_laconic: write frontmatter to both Petra-related bill files
